subject: Re: Hello
body:
yes

--- danars07@aol.com wrote:

>   Hi! It was nice to finally see you last night.
> Thank you so much for letting me go to Tokyo, I
> believe it will be a great learning experience and I
> never thought I would have had the chance to go.
> Japan doesn't require U.S. citizens to have a visa
> unless they are staying over 90 days. The cheapest
> flight I found is $956 and leaves Friday, Sept. 1st
> and returns Sunday, Sept. 10. Is this ok? 
>  Have fun on the island! 
>  Dana B
>  
>  
>
________________________________________________________________________

> search, pictures, email and IM. All on demand.
> Always Free.

body_html:
yes

--- danars07@aol.com wrote:

Hi! It was nice to finally see you last night.
Thank you so much for letting me go to Tokyo, I
believe it will be a great learning experience and I
never thought I would have had the chance to go.
Japan doesn't require U.S. citizens to have a visa
unless they are staying over 90 days. The cheapest
flight I found is $956 and leaves Friday, Sept. 1st
and returns Sunday, Sept. 10. Is this ok?
Have fun on the island!
Dana B
